details.test: Task 1: Register and schedule up to 2 free evening FinTech networking events
Task 2: Join and pin up to 3 high-rated communities
Task 3: Request 1-hour session with qualified marketing mentor
Task 4: Choose coworking plan with most meeting-room hours under 250 and start trial
Task 5: Post collaboration request for AI startup seeking UX designer
Task 6: Invite developer, designer, and business strategist to hackathon team
Task 7: Save pitch deck resources and assign to Pitch Prep folder
Task 8: Apply to up to 2 European seed-stage accelerators
Task 9: Schedule 3 Innovation Week meetings with mentor, investor, and founder
